understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game was to maneuver pushable objects or selectable pieces onto target goal tiles indicated by '+' symbols in the semantic grid, or otherwise satisfy specific win conditions as determined by the engine (such as moving a block or piece to a specific spot).
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is based on a grid where each cell is 3x3 pixels; selecting a direction (MOVE_LEFT, MOVE_RIGHT, etc.) shifts the selected piece one cell (3 pixels) unless blocked. Blocks can be pushed if adjacent in the movement direction, while walls prevent passage or pushing. Selection can be switched between multiple selectable pieces using the CLICK action with precise pixel coordinates. Some actions such as movement into obstacles may not always be fully blocked, so experimenting with actions is important to discover the precise behavior of walls and objects in each level.
